premium_summary: Emirates business class suits Dubai-linked travel, premium lounge access, and polished long-haul itineraries.
British Airways business class suits Heathrow-led premium travel with strong transatlantic reach.
Qatar Airways business class is known for privacy-led long-haul travel and strong Doha connectivity.
Singapore Airlines business class suits long-haul Asia travel with polished service and premium cabin consistency.
Delta One suits premium transatlantic and long-haul travel where airport flow and overnight timing matter.
